items.name_en: Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
items.name_cn:
Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
Weave Mini Basket style~Finally can be worn on the shoulder
It is based on the original bag shape with an added shoulder strap
And it is detachable!
It's like getting the use of two bags for the price of one
As the ace little cutie of the BV family
I really can't help but not own a chain style!
This bag from our shop is truly identical to the authentic one
Spending a little money to make a big impression~
Original Cowhide: Size: 20*16*13cm, Model: 5211#

items.name_en: In stock
items.name_cn:
In stock
Inspired by Brancusi's 20th-century modern sculpture "Bird in Space"
Muse brass handle, unique craftsmanship makes each handle one-of-a-kind, highlighting a precious sculptural feel
The shoulder strap features a metal chain with hardware inlay, adding depth to the bag; the hardware moon god design exudes a premium look
The Sardine handle creates a high-end modern look! The Sardine bag uses Intrecciato weaving to honor the brand's craftsmanship. The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)

items.name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag, smooth leather offers a clean and sharp look, like the efficiency and resilience of a career woman, premium hardware pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant, excellent leather feel is soft, this Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful, downplaying the complexity of styling, not competing, just interpreting itself with the best quality
items.name_cn:
Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag, smooth leather offers a clean and sharp look, like the efficiency and resilience of a career woman, premium hardware pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant, excellent leather feel is soft, this Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful, downplaying the complexity of styling, not competing, just interpreting itself with the best quality
Style No.: 806034 (Large)
Size: 30*20*8cm

items.name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag. Smooth leather offers a clean, sharp look, embodying the efficiency and resilience of a career woman. Premium metal pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant. Excellent leather with a soft touch. This Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful for everyone, downplaying complex styling and not competing for attention, simply interpreting itself with the best quality.

Bottega Veneta Small Woven Cloud Bag ☁ 2021's hottest🔥 The Pouch hand-woven lamb skin. The first series designed after Daniel Lee took over Celine. The silhouette is incredibly flattering~ stylish and chic~ elegant and minimalist, lazy yet intellectual. Style No.: 9918B💙💙Wide weave size:22*12*7⚠️
